mapper.insert: INSERT INTO DISPOSAL_NOTICE (disposal_id, notice_date, read_yn) VALUES (#{disposalId}, CURDATE(), 'N')
mapper.select: SELECT f.foodMaterialName, fc.foodCategory, IFNULL(d.disposalCountAll, 0) AS disposalCountAll, f.foodMaterialType, f.expirationDate AS expirationDate, d.disposal_Id AS disposalId FROM FOODM f JOIN FOODC fc ON f.foodCategory_Id = fc.foodCategory_Id LEFT JOIN DISPOSALS d ON f.foodMaterial_Id = d.foodMaterial_Id WHERE f.bId = #{bId} AND f.expirationDate < CURDATE() AND IFNULL(d.disposalCountAll, 0) > 0 ORDER BY f.expirationDate DESC
SELECT d.disposal_Id FROM DISPOSALS d JOIN FOODM f ON d.foodMaterial_Id = f.foodMaterial_Id WHERE f.bId = #{bId} AND f.expirationDate < CURDATE()
SELECT COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM FOODM f LEFT JOIN DISPOSALS d ON f.foodMaterial_Id = d.foodMaterial_Id WHERE f.bId = #{bId} AND f.expirationDate < CURDATE() AND IFNULL(d.disposalCountAll, 0) > 0

SELECT IFNULL(SUM(d.disposalCountAll), 0) AS total FROM DISPOSALS d JOIN FOODM f ON d.foodMaterial_Id = f.foodMaterial_Id WHERE f.bId = #{bId} AND f.foodMaterialType = '고체' AND f.expirationDate < CURDATE()

SELECT IFNULL(SUM(d.disposalCountAll), 0) AS total FROM DISPOSALS d JOIN FOODM f ON d.foodMaterial_Id = f.foodMaterial_Id WHERE f.bId = #{bId} AND f.foodMaterialType = '액체' AND f.expirationDate < CURDATE()
SELECT IFNULL(MAX(DATEDIFF(CURDATE(), expirationDate)), 0) AS max_day FROM FOODM WHERE bId = #{bId} AND expirationDate < CURDATE()
